events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario: residential concrete formwork, in-progress, inadequate bracing/kickers for pour pressure. ACI 347 governs formwork. Inadequate bracing is a serious hazard - form failure during pour can cause concrete blowout, injury, collapse. This is a fail, high/critical risk. Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant.

events.label: response
events.text: {"decision":"fail","risk":"critical","work_stage":"in-progress","component_conditions":["installed-defective","non-compliant"],"percent_complete":50,"value":0,"sound_source":"","confidence":0.9,"event_time":0.0,"rate":0.0,"order":[],"workable":[],"findings":["Inadequate bracing/kickers for pour pressure — formwork may collapse or blow out during concrete placement","Form bracing not designed/installed to resist lateral concrete pressure per ACI 347","Active pour in progress with insufficient lateral support creates immediate life-safety hazard to workers"],"actions":["Stop the pour immediately and evacuate workers from the formwork area","Install additional bracing, kickers, and ties engineered to resist calculated pour pressure before resuming","Inspect all formwork connections, tie points, and bearing surfaces for adequacy","Reduce pour rate or sequence pours to limit lateral pressure if bracing cannot be upgraded","Have competent person verify formwork stability and bracing capacity before resuming placement"],"rationale":"ACI 347 requires formwork and bracing to safely resist all anticipated loads including lateral concrete pressure during placement. Inadequate kickers/bracing during an active pour risks catastrophic form failure, blowout, and worker injury. Work must stop until bracing is brought into compliance.","references":["ACI 347"]}
